texto: This is a work of fiction, and the people in it are fictitious. The ghosts are real.
explicacao: Citação de Nathaniel Benchley sobre temas ligados a humor. “This is a work of fiction, and the people in it are fictitious. The ghosts are real.” articula humor, fiction, ghost-story em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e ghost-story.

texto: Nick got home the first week in December, to find New York still wallowing in its post-Armistice euphoria. Service men were celebrities wherever they went, and nothing was too good for them-especially the ones who were wounded-until it came down to such practical matters as finding housing or a job...It too him awhile to come to the conclusion that all the talk about help for veterans was just that, and anything that was done for him would have to be done by himself.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Nathaniel Benchley sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “Nick got home the first week in December, to find New York still wallowing in its post-Armistice …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a humor, fiction, first, útil em momentos de humor.

frase_original: Nick got home the first week in December, to find New York still wallowing in its post-Armistice euphoria. Service men were celebrities wherever they went, and nothing was too good for them-especially the ones who were wounded-until it came down to such practical matters as finding housing or a job...It too him awhile to come to the conclusion that all the talk about help for veterans was just that, and anything that was done for him would have to be done by himself.
